message:
refactor(codegen): Add auto-closing helpers to builtins/math.zig

Added emitConst, emitMethodStart, and emitBuiltinStart helpers to replace
verbose builder pattern boilerplate. Reduces code by 245 lines while
improving readability and reducing risk of mismatched parentheses.

Updated functions: genAbs, genMin, genMax, genRound, genPow, genChr,
genOrd, genDivmod, genHash
